r1.name: Amine Mansour
r1.text: Impeccable practice, highly professional staff, and completely pain-free procedures. I felt genuinely taken care of from start to finish.

r2.name: Elena Rossi
r2.text: Exceptional service! They provided clear, comprehensive explanations before starting, and my whitening results are absolutely perfect.

r3.name: Sarah Ben Ali
r3.text: An outstanding experience. The atmosphere is warm and comforting, and they utilize the latest dental technology. Highly recommended!

hero.title: Laser Diode Technology
hero.subtitle: The standard of modern, comfortable dentistry

content.description: At our modern practice in Nabeul, Tunisia, we actively leverage advanced diode laser systems. This allows us to deliver minimally invasive, faster, and virtually painless procedures, making it a cornerstone for optimal periodontal and cosmetic gum care.

advantages.title: Key Clinical Advantages:
advantages.subtitle: maximum comfort, structural precision, accelerated healing

advantages_items.item1: Unmatched patient comfort throughout the session
advantages_items.item2: Significantly faster soft-tissue recovery and healing
advantages_items.item4: Microscopic precision ensuring superior aesthetic results

content.description: Our high-resolution intraoral scanner generates highly detailed 3D digital impressions in seconds. Completely replacing traditional, messy impression pastes, it provides instant visualization of your dental anatomy, facilitating seamless prosthetic and aesthetic planning.

advantages_items.item2: Superior comfort with zero gag reflex triggers
advantages_items.item3: Impeccable clinical hygiene and touchless data creation
advantages_items.item4: Saves considerable time during design and clinical phases
advantages_items.item5: Exceptional micro-level margins for a flawless fit

intro.title: Why Choose Smile Expert?
intro.boldText: A boutique dental clinic where clinical precision meets absolute patient serenity.
intro.expertise: Backed by over a decade of continuous advanced expertise, we offer state-of-the-art treatments inside a welcoming environment designed to promote wellness.
intro.services: From fundamental routine maintenance and non-invasive laser updates to complex surgical and implant rehabilitations, our lead doctor takes the time to construct the perfect treatment scheme for you.

tech.sectionTitle: Equipped with Premier Digital Dental Technologies

expertise.description: Dr. Sarra Haouet combines advanced medical training with a dedicated passion for cosmetic architecture. Known for her gentle touch, she blends scientific rigor with empathetic patient communication to ensure a secure, customized dental experience.

card1.title: Keep Smiling with Pride
card1.des: Explore the life-changing transformations achieved for our patients. Every case demonstrates a carefully restored functional balance and a beautifully renewed sense of personal confidence.

depigmentation.title: Laser Gum Depigmentation
depigmentation.description: Advanced laser targets and gently breaks down dark melanin spots on the gum tissues, quickly restoring a uniform, healthy pink tone.

eclaircissement.title: Deep Stain Teeth Whitening
eclaircissement.description: Medical-grade whitening targeting deep internal discoloration to reveal a bright, youthful, and naturally radiant shade.

protheseTotale.title: Full Removable Denture
protheseTotale.description: Comprehensive functional reconstruction restoring full masticatory balance and underlying natural facial muscle support.

protheseFlexite.title: Flexite Partial Denture
protheseFlexite.description: Ultra-lightweight, flexible polymer partial prosthesis crafted without metal clasps for premium comfort and seamless invisibility.

strassDentaire.title: Aesthetic Dental Crystal
strassDentaire.description: Safe, non-destructive surface placement of a brilliant aesthetic gem without modifying or damaging the underlying enamel.

blanchiment.title: In-Office Fast Whitening
blanchiment.description: Chairside clinical whitening protocol that safely brightens teeth by multiple shades in a single session.

ctaSplit.description: Book your appointment today and take the definitive step toward a healthier, more beautiful smile.

cta.title: Ready to Smile with Total Confidence?

facettes.title: Premium Veneers
facettes.subtitle: A flawless, long-lasting transformation
facettes.description: Dental veneers allow us to redesign your smile alignment and shade in record time. Utilizing high-end digital smile design (DSD) and precise CAD/CAM manufacturing, the results look beautifully natural and are engineered to last a decade or more with proper care.

blanchiment.title: Laser Diode Teeth Whitening
blanchiment.subtitle: Professional shade lifting
blanchiment.description: A medical-grade aesthetic treatment formulated to safely dissolve embedded organic stains and brighten enamel. Fully customized to match your baseline biology, it provides a dramatic, fresh appearance while motivating advanced personal oral habits.

alignement.title: Laser Diode Gum Contouring
alignement.subtitle: Symmetrical smile geometry
alignement.description: Gingival reshaping elegantly balances asymmetrical gum lines, instantly improving smile proportions while protecting overall tissue health. Controlled laser energy guarantees a gentle, bloodless process with rapid recovery.

hyperpigmentation.title: Laser Gingival Melanin Regulation
hyperpigmentation.subtitle: Uniform, healthy tissue tone
hyperpigmentation.description: Gingival hyperpigmentation appears as darker shades due to focal melanin concentration. Our modern diode laser offers a micro-precise, highly successful outpatient technique that unifies gum tones comfortably with absolute clinical safety.

Examensreguliers.title: Preventive Diagnostics & Cleanings
Examensreguliers.subtitle: Securing your smile baseline
Examensreguliers.description: Excellent prophylaxis is the absolute foundation of long-term health. Our preventive sessions incorporate advanced ultrasonic scaling, air-polishing stain removal, and therapeutic remineralization treatments to strengthen enamel.

SoinsPreventifs.title: Conservative Tooth Protection
SoinsPreventifs.subtitle: Preserving natural tooth structures
SoinsPreventifs.description: From biomimetic composite bonding to advanced laser-assisted endodontics, our clinical goal is always tooth preservation. Every procedure is performed under meticulous magnification protocols to eliminate unnecessary discomfort.

Collage.title: Biomimetic Composite Bonding
Collage.subtitle: Seamless structural adjustments
Collage.description: If you present with chipped margins, minor developmental spaces, light decay, or localized structural wear, advanced composite layering provides an immediate aesthetic fix. This minimally invasive technique requires zero healthy tooth removal and is typically performed without anesthesia.

TraitementsEndodontiques.title: Laser-Assisted Root Canal Therapy & Obturation
TraitementsEndodontiques.subtitle: Saving severely compromised teeth
TraitementsEndodontiques.description: Often the ultimate alternative to save a deeply decayed or traumatized tooth from extraction. Performed under effective local anesthesia to ensure absolute comfort, our technique integrates laser sterilization within the root canals followed by hermetic sealing to guard against reinfection.

Extraction.title: Clinical Extractions
Extraction.subtitle: Controlled, atraumatic tissue removal
Extraction.description: When extensive radiographic and clinical evaluation reveals that a tooth can no longer meet biological conservation criteria, a gentle extraction is safely performed to neutralize systemic infectious risks.

ChirurgieImplantaire.title: Digital Computer-Guided Implantology
ChirurgieImplantaire.subtitle: Flawless computer-assisted planning
ChirurgieImplantaire.description: Using high-definition Cone Beam CT scans merged with 3D digital oral maps, we fully simulate ideal implant placement in software prior to surgery. A customized static surgical guide is then manufactured, allowing us to place implants safely with no scalpel cuts or stitches.

ProthèsesAmovibles.title: Advanced Removable Prostheses
ProthèsesAmovibles.subtitle: Flexible, high-stability dental solutions
ProthèsesAmovibles.description: Crafted using premium biocompatible resins, our removable complete and partial solutions provide a highly adaptable, natural-looking fix for tooth loss. They offer high structural comfort, easy maintenance, and restore full facial symmetry.

FacettesDentaires.title: Custom Ceramic Veneers
FacettesDentaires.subtitle: Elite cosmetic engineering
FacettesDentaires.description: Custom fabricated, ultra-thin ceramic shells meticulously bonded over the teeth surfaces. Designed to instantly mask underlying structural defects, color deviations, or minor spacing, giving you a perfectly tailored, bright smile.
